overview: Octopus is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): -50 HP, 12 physical damage, 0 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. combat radius 100.
